title: Landing Page Renders Correctly
description: Verify the landing page renders hero section, pipeline steps, and CTA links
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/
Verify the hero section is visible with the headline 'Know what breaks before it ships'
Verify the 'Open Dashboard' button is visible
Verify the 'Create a Release' button is visible
Verify the 4 pipeline steps are rendered (Paste Release Notes, AI Risk Analysis, Track & Approve, Ship or Block)
Verify the CTA link 'Create your first release' is visible at the bottom
Click 'Open Dashboard' and verify navigation to /dashboard
Navigate back to /
Click 'Create a Release' and verify navigation to /releases/new

title: Dashboard Empty State
description: Verify the dashboard shows an empty state when no releases exist
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/dashboard
Verify the page heading 'Releases' is visible
Verify the 'New Release' button is visible in the header
If no releases exist, verify an empty state message or empty list is shown
Click 'New Release' button and verify navigation to /releases/new

title: Create Release Form - Field Validation
description: Verify the create release form validates required fields correctly
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/releases/new
Verify the page heading 'Create Release' is visible
Verify the Title input field is present
Verify the Version input field is present
Verify the Owner input field is present
Verify the Release Notes textarea is present
Click the 'Create & Continue' button without filling any fields
Verify a validation error is shown for the Title field
Verify a validation error is shown for the Release Notes field
Verify the form does not submit

title: Create Release Form - Successful Submission
description: Verify a release can be created successfully and user is redirected
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/releases/new
Fill in the Title field with 'Test Release'
Fill in the Version field with 'v1.0.0'
Fill in the Owner field with 'Test Owner'
Fill in the Release Notes textarea with 'Added user authentication and payment gateway migration. Updated webhook endpoints.'
Click the 'Create & Continue' button
Verify the button shows loading state
Verify the page redirects to /releases/[id]
Verify the release detail page shows the title 'Test Release'
Verify the status badge shows 'DRAFT'
Verify the verdict badge shows 'NEEDS ATTENTION'

title: Create Release Form - Cancel Navigation
description: Verify the cancel button navigates back
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/releases/new
Fill in the Title field with 'Cancelled Release'
Click the 'Cancel' button
Verify the page navigates away from /releases/new

title: Release Detail - DRAFT State Before Analysis
description: Verify the release detail page shows the correct DRAFT empty state before analysis
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/releases/new
Fill in the Title field with 'Draft Release Test'
Fill in the Release Notes textarea with 'Migrated database schema and updated API endpoints'
Click 'Create & Continue'
Wait for redirect to /releases/[id]
Verify the status badge shows 'DRAFT'
Verify the 'Run Analysis' button is visible
Verify a 'Ready for analysis' empty state is shown with the Sparkles icon
Verify no risk items are shown
Verify no checklist items are shown
Verify the release notes content is displayed

title: Run Analysis - Triggers Analysis and Shows Results
description: Verify clicking Run Analysis triggers the analysis and displays risks and checklist
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/releases/new
Fill in the Title field with 'Analysis Test Release'
Fill in the Release Notes textarea with 'Added payment gateway migration. Updated webhook signature verification. Added retry logic for failed payment captures. Changed subscription billing cycle.'
Click 'Create & Continue'
Wait for redirect to /releases/[id]
Click the 'Run Analysis' button
Verify the button shows loading state ('Analyzing...')
Verify a loading spinner card is shown
Wait for analysis to complete
Verify the status badge is no longer 'DRAFT'
Verify the 'Predicted Risks' section is visible with risk items
Verify each risk has a severity badge (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW)
Verify the 'Mitigation Checklist' section is visible
Verify the 'Re-run Analysis' button is now shown instead of 'Run Analysis'
Verify summary stats are visible (Total Risks, Unresolved, Checklist Done, Approved)

title: Risk Toggle - Mark Risk as Resolved
description: Verify risks can be toggled as resolved and risk score updates
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/releases/new
Create a release with payment-related release notes
Click 'Run Analysis' and wait for completion
Note the initial risk score
Find an unresolved risk item in the Predicted Risks section
Click the toggle/resolve button on the risk
Verify the risk is now marked as resolved (visual change)
Verify the risk score has decreased or changed
Verify the unresolved count in summary stats has decreased

title: Checklist Toggle - Complete Checklist Item
description: Verify checklist items can be toggled complete and progress updates
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/releases/new
Create a release with migration-related release notes
Click 'Run Analysis' and wait for completion
Find an incomplete checklist item in the Mitigation Checklist section
Note the initial checklist progress count
Click the checkbox to mark the item as complete
Verify the checklist item is now marked as completed
Verify the checklist progress count has increased
Click the checkbox again to uncheck the item
Verify the item is unchecked and progress decreases

title: Approval Submission - Submit Engineering Approval
description: Verify approvals can be submitted for each role
steps: Navigate to an analyzed release detail page
Scroll to the Approvals section
Verify approval cards for ENGINEERING, QA, and PRODUCT roles are visible
Find the ENGINEERING approval card
Select 'APPROVED' status
Optionally add a comment 'Looks good to ship'
Click submit/approve button
Verify the ENGINEERING approval shows 'APPROVED' status
Verify a success toast notification is shown

title: Full Release Approval Flow - READY Verdict
description: Verify that resolving all risks, completing checklist, and getting all approvals results in READY verdict
steps: Create a release with: 'Minor UI update to button colors and text labels'
Click 'Run Analysis' and wait for completion
Resolve all risk items by clicking their toggle buttons
Complete all checklist items by clicking their checkboxes
Submit APPROVED for ENGINEERING role
Submit APPROVED for QA role
Submit APPROVED for PRODUCT role
Verify the verdict badge changes to 'READY'
Verify the status badge shows 'READY'

title: Timeline Events Display
description: Verify the timeline shows all events in chronological order
steps: Create a new release
Navigate to the release detail page
Scroll to the Timeline section
Verify a CREATED event is shown in the timeline
Click 'Run Analysis'
Wait for analysis completion
Verify an ANALYZED event is added to the timeline
Toggle a risk item
Verify a RISK_RESOLVED or RISK_UNRESOLVED event is added
Toggle a checklist item
Verify a CHECKLIST_COMPLETED or CHECKLIST_UNCHECKED event is added

title: Re-run Analysis Clears Old Data
description: Verify that re-running analysis replaces previous risks and checklist items
steps: Create a release and run analysis
Note the number of risks and checklist items generated
Click the 'Re-run Analysis' button
Wait for analysis to complete
Verify the risks section is refreshed with new data
Verify the checklist section is refreshed with new data

title: Dashboard Shows Release Cards with Correct Badges
description: Verify the dashboard shows created releases with proper status and verdict badges
steps: Create at least one release via /releases/new
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/dashboard
Verify the release appears in the list
Verify the release title is shown
Verify a status badge is shown on the release card
Verify a verdict badge is shown on the release card
Click on the release card
Verify navigation to /releases/[id]

title: Back to Dashboard Navigation
description: Verify the breadcrumb link on release detail page navigates back to dashboard
steps: Navigate to a release detail page
Click the 'Back to Dashboard' breadcrumb link
Verify navigation to /dashboard
